mapper.sql: lesson_id, chapter_id, lesson_name, duration, is_free, video_url, sort_order, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag
mapper.select: select from jst_course_lesson where lesson_id = #{lessonId} and del_flag = '0' limit 1
select from jst_course_lesson where chapter_id = #{chapterId} and del_flag = '0' order by sort_order asc, lesson_id asc
mapper.update: update jst_course_lesson set lesson_name = #{entity.lessonName}, duration = #{entity.duration}, is_free = #{entity.isFree}, video_url = #{entity.videoUrl}, sort_order = #{entity.sortOrder}, update_by = #{entity.updateBy}, update_time = #{entity.updateTime} where lesson_id = #{entity.lessonId} and del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete: delete l from jst_course_lesson l inner join jst_course_chapter c on c.chapter_id = l.chapter_id where c.course_id = #{courseId}
